file_name: Questionnaire - CVS Group – Paws at Prospect Vet and Eyes at Prospect Vet.pdf

questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with CVS Group and/or Paws.

Outline your views on whether either or both of Paws at Prospect Vet and Eyes at Prospect Vet compete closely with any of: a) Walkerville Vet; b) Pet Universe Manningham; and c) Pet Universe Northgate.
Please list any other veterinary practices that compete closely with Paws at Prospect Vet and Eyes at Prospect Vet.

Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition, including if you have any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
